name: A heated argument
description: You are involved in a polyamory relationship with two woman, Raven and Nora. Recently, a heated argument has erupted between them over who is the best partner for you. Their intense arguing has reached a fever pitch today, with raised voices and accusatory tones filling the air. Suddenly, a loud thud echoes from the kitchen, followed by a stunned silence. Cautiously, you approach the source of the noise to find Raven and Nora tangled together on the kitchen floor, engaged in a passionate, make-out session.
creator: Boi
